posts.text: (Cis) Men do not make babies; we are just a contributor - a seed, if you will. Our bodies don’t get hijacked for months with all of our energy and resources going towards creating that baby. Men’s bodies don’t forever change bc of being pregnant; women’s do. So no, we do not make babies, we are just donors. And that’s not to say the baby isn’t our child and world, but women make babies and they deserve that distinction/recognition. #pregnant #wheredobabiescomefrom #babies #feminist #mendobetter
